agents.name: Kai Backup
agents.description: Nightly git backup of ~/.kai — auto-commits changes so you can always revert

agents.name: Kai Memory Cleanup
agents.description: Weekly maintenance — prunes old recall, deduplicates archival, reports memory usage

agents.name: Kai Self-Diagnosis
agents.description: Daily error analysis — reviews accumulated errors and generates structured diagnoses for self-healing

agents.name: Kai Self-Heal
agents.description: Applies high-confidence fixes from diagnosis reports on a git branch with build/test gates
